C:\MinGW\bin\ar.exe qc libevidence_vault_core.a CMakeFiles/evidence_vault_core.dir/src/ConfigManager.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/evidence_vault_core.dir/src/DatabaseManager.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/evidence_vault_core.dir/src/Evidence.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/evidence_vault_core.dir/src/sqlite3_stub.cpp.obj
C:\MinGW\bin\ranlib.exe libevidence_vault_core.a
